summary: Full WHEP live-egress plane proven end-to-end through the production gateway: provision -> WHIP-to-Stream feed -> WHEP subscribe (bytesReceived>0, real VP9 media) -> egress meter tick -> dogfood-excluded ($0). All A-E phases complete; client (C) shipped INERT pending desktop merge.

phases.name: ingest-arm

receipt.chain: auth -> scope -> entitlement-floor -> gateway-forward -> edge(rt.wave.online) -> CF create-input
receipt.kv: stream-input-org:<uid> = <org> (bare string), reverse org-stream-inputs:<org> index; saga-compensation deletes orphan input on required-forward-KV fail

phases.root_cause_fix: CfStreamLiveClientImpl stored unbound global fetch as instance prop -> Workers 'Illegal invocation' -> 502. Fix = fetch.bind(globalThis) (PR #196) + regression test on default-fetch path.

receipt.cf_finding: CF Stream WebRTC (WHEP) playback is served ONLY for WHIP-ingested inputs. RTMPS/SRT ingest -> HLS/DASH, WebRTC playback = 409. WHEP egress MUST feed via WHIP-to-Stream (browser sendonly -> input webRTC.url).
receipt.codec_ceiling: CF Stream Live WebRTC accepts VP9(rec)/VP8/h264-Constrained-Baseline-L3.1 (720p cap). 1080p H.264 exceeds L3.1. Fix = setCodecPreferences VP9-first.
receipt.feed: harness/whip-to-stream-pub.mjs (Chromium fake-media, real looping VP9 Big Buck Bunny via --use-file-for-fake-video-capture=<Y4M> + --use-file-for-fake-audio-capture=<WAV>) -> input connected
receipt.publish_handshake: WHIP-to-Stream publish -> 201 connected; direct CF /webRTC/play -> 201 + answer + 2 tracks negotiated

phases.name: client-discovery
phases.pending: wave-desktop PR #53 merge (◆ Jake's-hand; main = PR-required)

receipt.wiring: shared/ipc.ts SessionSource{uid,room,createdAt} + sessionListSources channel; main/ipc.ts handler whep:read GET /v1/whep/sources (404/501 edge-INERT -> honest []); whep-client.ts buildSubscribeEndpoint(endpoint,uid) URL-encoded ?resource=; Receivers.tsx <select> picker
receipt.tests: type-check clean; vitest 139/139 (3 new for buildSubscribeEndpoint); lint 0 warnings

receipt.media: RECEIPT-PROVEN bytesReceived:4224 packets:38 kinds:[audio,video] — 2 tracks connected, real VP9 Big Buck Bunny 1080p
receipt.chain: dogfood key -> gateway auth -> scope -> entitlement-floor -> forward -> edge(rt.wave.online) -> WHEP relay -> CF Stream WebRTC playback -> browser recvonly
receipt.relay_bug_fix: liveWhepDeps() stored UNBOUND global fetch -> deps.fetch() 'Illegal invocation' -> REALTIME_UPSTREAM 503 on EVERY live subscribe. Fix = fetch: fetch.bind(globalThis) (PR #209, deployed run 29467027860). Regression test drives DEFAULT liveWhepDeps path w/ this-strict fetch stub.
receipt.isolation: direct CF /webRTC/play bytesReceived>0 (CF+media+codec OK) while gateway->edge 503 -> bug isolated to WAVE edge code. HLS 500 was a red herring.

receipt.flow: subscribe -> 201 (Location /v1/whep/resource/<rid>) -> held (real bytes 15228) -> DELETE -> 204 teardown -> edge emitWhepTeardownMeter POST /v1/internal/usage -> gateway ingest -> counter store
receipt.meter_read: GET /v1/usage shows wave_whep_egress_minutes=60000ms -> billable 1 min for dogfood org 18e9224a (baseline 0)
receipt.gateway_registration: origin/main src/product-meters.ts:169 registers {event:'wave_whep_egress_minutes', priceEnv:'STRIPE_PRICE_WHEP_EGRESS_MIN'} (price price_1TpvB8DZp3QOCf5POyGg1llx, $0.003/min LIVE)
receipt.meter_mechanism: unregistered meter is SILENTLY DROPPED at ingest; duration=Math.ceil(ms/60000) (started session bills >=1min); idempotent on resourceId; fail-open emit
receipt.dogfood_exclusion: 2-layer: gateway deployed wrangler.toml [vars]:522 BILLING_EXCLUDE_ORGS='18e9224a-...' -> meter-sync parseBillingExcludeOrgs has(org) -> continue BEFORE any Stripe call (layer 1); !customerId -> continue (layer 2). Gateway reads its OWN toml NOT Doppler. Same path proven for WHIP #109 on this org.

crossings.dogfood_key: DONE — Supabase api_keys id be5af222-e042-4c65-b250-ee39b2550b31, user_id 18e9224a, scopes [whep:read,whep:write,usage:read]; Bearer -> Doppler WHEP_DOGFOOD_KEY. No Stripe write.
crossings.wave_internal_secret_sync: NOT NEEDED — dogfood-key path made direct-edge unnecessary (orphan #155 untouched).
crossings.real_external_stripe_sub: NOT NEEDED for proof — dogfood floor cleaner; valid for a future real-customer entitlement proof.

residual_followups.item: route-dispatch.ts decompose (799 lines — 1 from the 800 file-size ceiling)
re-home epic commit cbec1ca off epic/metronome-m-phases at PR time
daily meter-sync cron flush of today's WHEP row (will skip via BILLING_EXCLUDE_ORGS, deterministic)

reusable_rig.publish: harness/whip-to-stream-pub.mjs — FAKE_VIDEO_Y4M + FAKE_AUDIO_WAV (VP9), HOLD_MS>=240000 (must outlast the subscribe)
reusable_rig.subscribe_meter: .whep-meter-proof.mjs (subscribe+hold+DELETE; must live INSIDE edge repo — NODE_PATH does not resolve ESM imports)
reusable_rig.assets: BBB 1080p mp4 -> Y4M 30fps (ffmpeg -r 30 -pix_fmt yuv420p -f yuv4mpegpipe) + tone WAV
reusable_rig.cleanup: 5 test CF inputs + KV mappings all DELETE 200
